subcodes.first_line: Verily, it behoveth all companions and loved ones to be seated upon the thrones of love and upon the pavilions thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی بر جمیع اصحاب و احباب لازم است که بر سرایر محبت جالس باشند و بر رفارف
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
